response.overview: A male novelist named Zahim (Ashraf Muslim) is deeply disappointed by the failure of his first novel in the market. However, Dean (Mark Adam) has suggested that Zahim use a female pen name, namely Zuraya Amri. Zahim feels challenged when he reads negative comments from a blogger, Mira (Reen Rahim) who constantly attacks him on social media. Zahim decides to steal all of Zuraya Amri's novels from Mira's bookstore. Unfortunately, Zahim is caught and forced to work at the bookstore without pay to avoid being arrested by the police. But what makes it most difficult is that he is forced to face the blogger whom he quite despises for an entire month!
response.title: Si Pencuri Kacak
